creator: david.marec@proton.me
text:
As the maintainer of this port, I did not receive any email from Bugzilla at this point, to <mailto:david@lapinbilly.eu>.


Moreover, I did not get any notification from /portscout/ either as I did for previous release.


I sent emails to make sure everything works fine and I did receive emails at this address.

-- 
David Marec
